objectives.text: 掌握 because of 的用法
了解原因状语从句的位置

blocks.content: 三个连词都表示原因，但语气强弱和使用场景不同：

rows: I stayed home because I was sick.
Since you are busy, I will go alone.
As it is late, let's go home.

blocks.content: because of 后面接**名词短语**，because 后面接**句子**：

rows: I stayed home because I was sick.
I stayed home because of the rain.
He was late because of getting up late.

blocks.title: 转换公式
blocks.content: because + 句子 = because of + 名词短语。例如：Because it rained, I stayed home. = Because of the rain, I stayed home.
原因状语从句可以放在主句**前面或后面**：

rows: Because I was tired, I went to bed early.
从句在前，主句在后，中间用逗号
I went to bed early because I was tired.
从句在后，主句和从句之间不加逗号

blocks.title: 注意
blocks.content: 不能与 so 连用。因为它们都表示因果关系，连用会造成重复。错误：Because I was tired, so I went to bed early.

problem.content: ___ you are here, could you help me with this?

solution.content: 「你在这里」是双方都知道的事实，用 since 表示已知原因比较恰当。答案选 B。

examples.title: 例2：because 和 because of 的转换

problem.content: He was late ___ the heavy traffic.

solution.content: the heavy traffic 是名词短语，不能用 because（because 后接句子），应该用 because of。答案选 B。

children.text: because 语气最强，直接原因
since 已知原因，双方都知道
because + 句子 = because of + 名词
because 不与 so 连用
